     +----------+    +---------+
     |  Bottom  |    |  Right  |
     +----------+    +---------+
           ^              ^
           +--------------+
           |
     +-----+----+
     |  Center  |
     +----------+
           ^
           |
    +---+--+-+----+
+---+---+    +----+---+
|  Top  |    |  Left  |
+-------+    +--------+
